description_long: This is a small potted cactus with a globular, ribbed green body covered in clusters of white spines. The cactus is planted in a square, beige pot filled with dark brown soil. Several offshoots or buds are visible on the sides of the main cactus body, some of which are lighter in color and appear to be new growths. The pot itself is plain, with a slightly weathered and matte finish, and has no visible decorative elements. The overall appearance suggests a hardy, low-maintenance plant suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A small, ribbed green cactus with white spines in a plain, square beige pot filled with soil. Several offshoots are visible, giving it a lively and natural look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cactus body centered in the pot, with spines and ribbing clearly visible and no offshoots prominent.
description_view_1: This side view reveals a large offshoot protruding from the right side of the cactus, as well as a smaller bud near the soil.
description_view_2: The back view highlights a prominent offshoot on the left side of the cactus and another smaller bud at the base.
description_view_3: This side view displays both the large and small offshoots, with the ribbed structure of the cactus clearly visible.
